overall.description: A cinematic showcase of a futuristic luxury apartment interior from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a glowing pink marble dining table. The camera smoothly orbits the table revealing floor-to-ceiling windows with city and tropical views, modern art, and high-end interior design.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse dining area with panoramic city views

agents.ego_description: slowly orbiting the dining table to showcase the room's left side with panoramic city views through floor-to-ceiling windows

entered.detail: large futuristic dining table with pink marble pattern and integrated gold lighting strips
six sleek black dining chairs surrounding the table
tall glass windows revealing a futuristic cityscape with buildings
large white rectangular area rug under the dining set
polished dark wooden flooring visible around the rug perimeter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a luxurious dining area featuring a striking pink marble table with integrated lighting as the centerpiece. The camera slowly orbits the table, revealing black modern chairs and a white area rug set against dark hardwood floors, with expansive left-side windows offering views of a futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between dining and living space with contemporary wall art

events.description: camera moves past the far end glass doors into area with prominent wall-mounted artwork and different window arrangement

agents.ego_description: continuing the circular path around the table, revealing the far end sliding doors and right side wall decorations

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass sliding doors leading to an exterior balcony area
abstract paintings and sculptures mounted on the dark interior wall
large windows on the right wall showing tropical vegetation outside

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its orbit, it passes the far end of the room where glass sliding doors lead to an exterior balcony. The lighting shifts slightly as the view transitions to the right wall, revealing a collection of modern artwork and new windows showing greenery outside, while the city view from the left fades from sight.

scene_state.functional_zone: dining area with tropical exterior views and modern furnishings

events.description: bright morning sunlight streams through right side windows illuminating the table surface and revealing palm trees outside

agents.ego_description: completing the circular tour around the table, focusing on the right side windows with tropical views and modern console furniture

entered.detail: lush palm trees and tropical greenery visible through the right windows
sleek black console table with decorative items against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment captures the right side of the apartment where strong natural light floods in through windows overlooking tropical palm trees. The camera passes a modern console table while completing its orbit around the pink marble dining table, with the bright exterior greenery contrasting against the dark interior tones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital camera movement that transitions from a view of a futuristic cityscape to a bright, tropical exterior. It begins by circling a glowing pink marble dining table, gliding past black modern chairs and a white rug over dark hardwood floors while the city skyline is visible through expansive left-side windows. As the camera continues its rotation, it passes glass sliding doors leading to a balcony, shifting the focus from the urban horizon toward a collection of modern artwork on the right wall. The scene then opens further as the camera passes a modern console table, allowing strong natural light to flood the interior. Finally, the orbit completes as the view settles on lush tropical palm trees visible through the right-side windows, contrasting the vibrant greenery against the dark tones of the luxury apartment.
